"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot"
import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { PanelLeft } from "lucide-react"

import { useIsMobile } from "@/registry/new-york/hooks/use-mobile"
import { Button } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/button"
import { Input } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/input"
import { Separator } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/separator"
import {
  Sheet,
  SheetContent,
  SheetDescription,
  SheetHeader,
  SheetTitle,
} from "@/registry/new-york/ui/sheet"
import { Skeleton } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/skeleton"
import {
  Tooltip,
  TooltipContent,
  TooltipProvider,
  TooltipTrigger,
} from "@/registry/new-york/ui/tooltip"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME = "sidebar_state"
const SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7
const SIDEBAR_WIDTH = "16rem"
const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE = "18rem"
const SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON = "3rem"
const SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT = "b"

type SidebarContextProps = {
  state: "expanded" | "collapsed"
  open: boolean
  setOpen: (open: boolean) => void
  openMobile: boolean
  setOpenMobile: (open: boolean) => void
  isMobile: boolean
  toggleSidebar: () => void
}

const SidebarContext = React.createContext<SidebarContextProps | null>(null)

function useSidebar() {
  const context = React.useContext(SidebarContext)
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error("useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider.")
  }

  return context
}

const SidebarProvider = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
    defaultOpen?: boolean
    open?: boolean
    onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void
  }
>(
  (
    {
      defaultOpen = true,
      open: openProp,
      onOpenChange: setOpenProp,
      className,
      style,
      children,
      ...props
    },
    ref
  ) => {
    const isMobile = useIsMobile()
    const [openMobile, setOpenMobile] = React.useState(false)

    // This is the internal state of the sidebar.
    // We use openProp and setOpenProp for control from outside the component.
    const [_open, _setOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen)
    const open = openProp ?? _open
    const setOpen = React.useCallback(
      (value: boolean | ((value: boolean) => boolean)) => {
        const openState = typeof value === "function" ? value(open) : value
        if (setOpenProp) {
          setOpenProp(openState)
        } else {
          _setOpen(openState)
        }

        // This sets the cookie to keep the sidebar state.
        document.cookie = `${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_NAME}=${openState}; path=/; max-age=${SIDEBAR_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}`
      },
      [setOpenProp, open]
    )

    // Helper to toggle the sidebar.
    const toggleSidebar = React.useCallback(() => {
      return isMobile
        ? setOpenMobile((open) => !open)
        : setOpen((open) => !open)
    }, [isMobile, setOpen, setOpenMobile])

    // Adds a keyboard shortcut to toggle the sidebar.
    React.useEffect(() => {
      const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
        if (
          event.key === SIDEBAR_KEYBOARD_SHORTCUT &&
          (event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)
        ) {
          event.preventDefault()
          toggleSidebar()
        }
      }

      window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown)
      return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown)
    }, [toggleSidebar])

    // We add a state so that we can do data-state="expanded" or "collapsed".
    // This makes it easier to style the sidebar with Tailwind classes.
    const state = open ? "expanded" : "collapsed"

    const contextValue = React.useMemo<SidebarContextProps>(
      () => ({
        state,
        open,
        setOpen,
        isMobile,
        openMobile,
        setOpenMobile,
        toggleSidebar,
      }),
      [state, open, setOpen, isMobile, openMobile, setOpenMobile, toggleSidebar]
    )

    return (
      <SidebarContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
        <TooltipProvider delayDuration={0}>
          <div
            style={
              {
                "--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH,
                "--sidebar-width-icon": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_ICON,
                ...style,
              } as React.CSSProperties
            }
            className={tw.def([className], {
                display: "flex",
                minHeight: "min-h-svh",
                width: "w-full",
            })}
            ref={ref}
            {...props}
          >
            {children}
          </div>
        </TooltipProvider>
      </SidebarContext.Provider>
    )
  }
)
SidebarProvider.displayName = "SidebarProvider"

const Sidebar = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
    side?: "left" | "right"
    variant?: "sidebar" | "floating" | "inset"
    collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "icon" | "none"
  }
>(
  (
    {
      side = "left",
      variant = "sidebar",
      collapsible = "offcanvas",
      className,
      children,
      ...props
    },
    ref
  ) => {
    const { isMobile, state, openMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar()

    if (collapsible === "none") {
      return (
        <div
          className={tw.def([className], {
                  display: "flex",
                  height: "h-full",
                  width: "w-[--sidebar-width]",
                  flexDirection: "flex-col",
              })}
          ref={ref}
          {...props}
        >
          {children}
        </div>
      )
    }

    if (isMobile) {
      return (
        <Sheet open={openMobile} onOpenChange={setOpenMobile} {...props}>
          <SheetContent
            data-sidebar="sidebar"
            data-mobile="true"
            className={tw.style({
                      width: "w-[--sidebar-width]",
                      padding: "p-0",
                      "[&>button]": {
                          display: "[&>button]:hidden",
                      },
                  }).class()}
            style={
              {
                "--sidebar-width": SIDEBAR_WIDTH_MOBILE,
              } as React.CSSProperties
            }
            side={side}
          >
            <SheetHeader className={tw.style({
                      display: "sr-only",
                  }).class()}>
              <SheetTitle>Sidebar</SheetTitle>
              <SheetDescription>Displays the mobile sidebar.</SheetDescription>
            </SheetHeader>
            <div className={tw.style({
                      display: "flex",
                      height: "h-full",
                      width: "w-full",
                      flexDirection: "flex-col",
                  }).class()}>{children}</div>
          </SheetContent>
        </Sheet>
      )
    }

    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={tw.style({
                display: "hidden",
                md: {
                    display: "md:block",
                },
            }).class()}
        data-state={state}
        data-collapsible={state === "collapsed" ? collapsible : ""}
        data-variant={variant}
        data-side={side}
      >
        {/* This is what handles the sidebar gap on desktop */}
        <div
          className={tw.def([variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
                              ? "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)_+_theme(spacing.4))]"
                              : "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[--sidebar-width-icon]"], {
                    position: "relative",
                    width: "w-[--sidebar-width]",
                    backgroundColor: "bg-transparent",
                    transitionProperty: "transition-[width]",
                    transitionDuration: "duration-200",
                    transitionTimingFunction: "ease-linear",
                    "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]": {
                        width: "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:w-0",
                    },
                    "group-data-[side=right]": {
                        rotate: "group-data-[side=right]:rotate-180",
                    },
                })}
        />
        <div
          className={tw.def([side === "left"
                              ? "left-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:left-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]"
                              : "right-0 group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:right-[calc(var(--sidebar-width)*-1)]", variant === "floating" || variant === "inset"
                              ? "p-2 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[calc(var(--sidebar-width-icon)_+_theme(spacing.4)_+2px)]"
                              : "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:w-[--sidebar-width-icon] group-data-[side=left]:border-r group-data-[side=right]:border-l", className], {
                    position: "fixed",
                    inset: "inset-y-0",
                    zIndex: "z-10",
                    display: "hidden",
                    height: "h-svh",
                    width: "w-[--sidebar-width]",
                    transitionProperty: "transition-[left,right,width]",
                    transitionDuration: "duration-200",
                    transitionTimingFunction: "ease-linear",
                    md: {
                        display: "md:flex",
                    },
                })}
          {...props}
        >
          <div
            data-sidebar="sidebar"
            className={tw.style({
                        display: "flex",
                        height: "h-full",
                        width: "w-full",
                        flexDirection: "flex-col",
                        "group-data-[variant=floating]": {
                            borderRadius: "group-data-[variant=floating]:rounded-lg",
                            borderWidth: "group-data-[variant=floating]:border",
                            boxShadow: "group-data-[variant=floating]:shadow",
                        },
                    }).class()}
          >
            {children}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }
)
Sidebar.displayName = "Sidebar"

const SidebarTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof Button>,
  React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>
>(({ className, onClick, ...props }, ref) => {
  const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar()

  return (
    <Button
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="trigger"
      variant="ghost"
      size="icon"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          height: "h-7",
          width: "w-7",
      })}
      onClick={(event) => {
        onClick?.(event)
        toggleSidebar()
      }}
      {...props}
    >
      <PanelLeft />
      <span className={tw.style({
              display: "sr-only",
          }).class()}>Toggle Sidebar</span>
    </Button>
  )
})
SidebarTrigger.displayName = "SidebarTrigger"

const SidebarRail = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLButtonElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"button">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  const { toggleSidebar } = useSidebar()

  return (
    <button
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="rail"
      aria-label="Toggle Sidebar"
      tabIndex={-1}
      onClick={toggleSidebar}
      title="Toggle Sidebar"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          position: "absolute",
          inset: "inset-y-0",
          zIndex: "z-20",
          display: "hidden",
          width: "w-4",
          translate: "-translate-x-1/2",
          transitionProperty: "transition-all",
          transitionTimingFunction: "ease-linear",
          after: {
              position: "after:absolute",
              inset: "after:inset-y-0",
              left: "after:left-1/2",
              width: "after:w-[2px]",
          },
          "group-data-[side=left]": {
              right: "group-data-[side=left]:-right-4",
          },
          "group-data-[side=right]": {
              left: "group-data-[side=right]:left-0",
          },
          sm: {
              display: "sm:flex",
          },
          "[[data-side=left]_&]": {
              cursor: "[[data-side=left]_&]:cursor-w-resize",
          },
          "[[data-side=right]_&]": {
              cursor: "[[data-side=right]_&]:cursor-e-resize",
          },
          "[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]": {
              cursor: "[[data-side=left][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-e-resize",
          },
          "[[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]": {
              cursor: "[[data-side=right][data-state=collapsed]_&]:cursor-w-resize",
          },
          "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]": {
              translate: "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:translate-x-0",
              after: {
                  left: "group-data-[collapsible=offcanvas]:after:left-full",
              },
          },
          "[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]": {
              right: "[[data-side=left][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-right-2",
          },
          "[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]": {
              left: "[[data-side=right][data-collapsible=offcanvas]_&]:-left-2",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarRail.displayName = "SidebarRail"

const SidebarInset = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"main">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <main
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.def([className], {
          position: "relative",
          display: "flex",
          width: "w-full",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          backgroundColor: "bg-background",
          md: {
              "peer-data-[variant=inset]": {
                  margin: ["md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:m-2", "md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:ml-0"],
                  borderRadius: "md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:rounded-xl",
                  boxShadow: "md:peer-data-[variant=inset]:shadow",
              },
              "peer-data-[state=collapsed]": {
                  "peer-data-[variant=inset]": {
                      margin: "md:peer-data-[state=collapsed]:peer-data-[variant=inset]:ml-2",
                  },
              },
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarInset.displayName = "SidebarInset"

const SidebarInput = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof Input>,
  React.ComponentProps<typeof Input>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <Input
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="input"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          height: "h-8",
          width: "w-full",
          backgroundColor: "bg-background",
          boxShadow: "shadow-none",
          "focus-visible": {
              boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarInput.displayName = "SidebarInput"

const SidebarHeader = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="header"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          gap: "gap-2",
          padding: "p-2",
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarHeader.displayName = "SidebarHeader"

const SidebarFooter = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="footer"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          gap: "gap-2",
          padding: "p-2",
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarFooter.displayName = "SidebarFooter"

const SidebarSeparator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof Separator>,
  React.ComponentProps<typeof Separator>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <Separator
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="separator"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          margin: "mx-2",
          width: "w-auto",
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarSeparator.displayName = "SidebarSeparator"

const SidebarContent = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="content"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          minHeight: "min-h-0",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          gap: "gap-2",
          overflow: "overflow-auto",
          "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
              overflow: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:overflow-hidden",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarContent.displayName = "SidebarContent"

const SidebarGroup = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="group"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          position: "relative",
          display: "flex",
          width: "w-full",
          minWidth: "min-w-0",
          flexDirection: "flex-col",
          padding: "p-2",
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarGroup.displayName = "SidebarGroup"

const SidebarGroupLabel = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> & { asChild?: boolean }
>(({ className, asChild = false, ...props }, ref) => {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "div"

  return (
    <Comp
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="group-label"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          height: "h-8",
          flexShrink: "shrink-0",
          alignItems: "items-center",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          padding: "px-2",
          fontSize: "text-xs",
          fontWeight: "font-medium",
          outlineStyle: "outline-none",
          transitionProperty: "transition-[margin,opacity]",
          transitionDuration: "duration-200",
          transitionTimingFunction: "ease-linear",
          "focus-visible": {
              boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
          },
          "[&>svg]": {
              width: "[&>svg]:size-4",
              flexShrink: "[&>svg]:shrink-0",
          },
          "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
              margin: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:-mt-8",
              opacity: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:opacity-0",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarGroupLabel.displayName = "SidebarGroupLabel"

const SidebarGroupAction = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLButtonElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"button"> & { asChild?: boolean }
>(({ className, asChild = false, ...props }, ref) => {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"

  return (
    <Comp
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="group-action"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          position: "absolute",
          right: "right-3",
          top: "top-3.5",
          display: "flex",
          aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
          width: "w-5",
          alignItems: "items-center",
          justifyContent: "justify-center",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          padding: "p-0",
          outlineStyle: "outline-none",
          transitionProperty: "transition-transform",
          "focus-visible": {
              boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
          },
          "[&>svg]": {
              width: "[&>svg]:size-4",
              flexShrink: "[&>svg]:shrink-0",
          },
          after: {
              position: "after:absolute",
              inset: "after:-inset-2",
              md: {
                  display: "after:md:hidden",
              },
          },
          "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
              display: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarGroupAction.displayName = "SidebarGroupAction"

const SidebarGroupContent = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div
    ref={ref}
    data-sidebar="group-content"
    className={tw.def([className], {
        width: "w-full",
        fontSize: "text-sm",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SidebarGroupContent.displayName = "SidebarGroupContent"

const SidebarMenu = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLUListElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"ul">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ul
    ref={ref}
    data-sidebar="menu"
    className={tw.def([className], {
        display: "flex",
        width: "w-full",
        minWidth: "min-w-0",
        flexDirection: "flex-col",
        gap: "gap-1",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SidebarMenu.displayName = "SidebarMenu"

const SidebarMenuItem = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLLIElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"li">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <li
    ref={ref}
    data-sidebar="menu-item"
    className={tw.def([className], {
        position: "relative",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SidebarMenuItem.displayName = "SidebarMenuItem"

const sidebarMenuButtonVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        display: "flex",
        width: "w-full",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        gap: "gap-2",
        overflow: "overflow-hidden",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        padding: "p-2",
        textAlign: "text-left",
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        outlineStyle: "outline-none",
        transitionProperty: "transition-[width,height,padding]",
        "focus-visible": {
            boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
        },
        disabled: {
            pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
            opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
        },
        "group-has-[[data-sidebar=menu-action]]/menu-item": {
            padding: "group-has-[[data-sidebar=menu-action]]/menu-item:pr-8",
        },
        "aria-disabled": {
            pointerEvents: "aria-disabled:pointer-events-none",
            opacity: "aria-disabled:opacity-50",
        },
        "data-[active=true]": {
            fontWeight: "data-[active=true]:font-medium",
        },
        "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
            padding: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:!p-2",
        },
        "[&>span:last-child]": {
            textOverflow: "[&>span:last-child]:truncate",
        },
        "[&>svg]": {
            width: "[&>svg]:size-4",
            flexShrink: "[&>svg]:shrink-0",
        },
    },
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: {
            },
            outline: {
                backgroundColor: "bg-background",
                boxShadow: "shadow-[0_0_0_1px_hsl(var(--sidebar-border))]",
                hover: {
                    boxShadow: "hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_hsl(var(--sidebar-accent))]",
                },
            },
        },
        size: {
            default: {
                height: "h-8",
                fontSize: "text-sm",
            },
            sm: {
                height: "h-7",
                fontSize: "text-xs",
            },
            lg: {
                height: "h-12",
                fontSize: "text-sm",
                "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
                    padding: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:!p-0",
                },
            },
        },
    },
})

const SidebarMenuButton = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLButtonElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
    asChild?: boolean
    isActive?: boolean
    tooltip?: string | React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipContent>
  } & VariantProps<typeof sidebarMenuButtonVariants>
>(
  (
    {
      asChild = false,
      isActive = false,
      variant = "default",
      size = "default",
      tooltip,
      className,
      ...props
    },
    ref
  ) => {
    const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"
    const { isMobile, state } = useSidebar()

    const button = (
      <Comp
        ref={ref}
        data-sidebar="menu-button"
        data-size={size}
        data-active={isActive}
        className={tw.join(sidebarMenuButtonVariants({ variant, size }), className)}
        {...props}
      />
    )

    if (!tooltip) {
      return button
    }

    if (typeof tooltip === "string") {
      tooltip = {
        children: tooltip,
      }
    }

    return (
      <Tooltip>
        <TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
        <TooltipContent
          side="right"
          align="center"
          hidden={state !== "collapsed" || isMobile}
          {...tooltip}
        />
      </Tooltip>
    )
  }
)
SidebarMenuButton.displayName = "SidebarMenuButton"

const SidebarMenuAction = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLButtonElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"button"> & {
    asChild?: boolean
    showOnHover?: boolean
  }
>(({ className, asChild = false, showOnHover = false, ...props }, ref) => {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"

  return (
    <Comp
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="menu-action"
      className={tw.def([showOnHover &&
                "group-focus-within/menu-item:opacity-100 group-hover/menu-item:opacity-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100 peer-data-[active=true]/menu-button:text-sidebar-accent-foreground md:opacity-0", className], {
          position: "absolute",
          right: "right-1",
          top: "top-1.5",
          display: "flex",
          aspectRatio: "aspect-square",
          width: "w-5",
          alignItems: "items-center",
          justifyContent: "justify-center",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          padding: "p-0",
          outlineStyle: "outline-none",
          transitionProperty: "transition-transform",
          "focus-visible": {
              boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
          },
          "[&>svg]": {
              width: "[&>svg]:size-4",
              flexShrink: "[&>svg]:shrink-0",
          },
          after: {
              position: "after:absolute",
              inset: "after:-inset-2",
              md: {
                  display: "after:md:hidden",
              },
          },
          "peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button": {
              top: "peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1",
          },
          "peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button": {
              top: "peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5",
          },
          "peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button": {
              top: "peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5",
          },
          "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
              display: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarMenuAction.displayName = "SidebarMenuAction"

const SidebarMenuBadge = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div
    ref={ref}
    data-sidebar="menu-badge"
    className={tw.def([className], {
        pointerEvents: "pointer-events-none",
        position: "absolute",
        right: "right-1",
        display: "flex",
        height: "h-5",
        minWidth: "min-w-5",
        userSelect: "select-none",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        justifyContent: "justify-center",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        padding: "px-1",
        fontSize: "text-xs",
        fontWeight: "font-medium",
        fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums",
        "peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button": {
            top: "peer-data-[size=sm]/menu-button:top-1",
        },
        "peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button": {
            top: "peer-data-[size=default]/menu-button:top-1.5",
        },
        "peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button": {
            top: "peer-data-[size=lg]/menu-button:top-2.5",
        },
        "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
            display: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SidebarMenuBadge.displayName = "SidebarMenuBadge"

const SidebarMenuSkeleton = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
    showIcon?: boolean
  }
>(({ className, showIcon = false, ...props }, ref) => {
  // Random width between 50 to 90%.
  const width = React.useMemo(() => {
    return `${Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 50}%`
  }, [])

  return (
    <div
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="menu-skeleton"
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          height: "h-8",
          alignItems: "items-center",
          gap: "gap-2",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          padding: "px-2",
      })}
      {...props}
    >
      {showIcon && (
        <Skeleton
          className={tw.style({
                      width: "size-4",
                      borderRadius: "rounded-md",
                  }).class()}
          data-sidebar="menu-skeleton-icon"
        />
      )}
      <Skeleton
        className={tw.style({
                  height: "h-4",
                  maxWidth: "max-w-[--skeleton-width]",
              }).class()}
        data-sidebar="menu-skeleton-text"
        style={
          {
            "--skeleton-width": width,
          } as React.CSSProperties
        }
      />
    </div>
  )
})
SidebarMenuSkeleton.displayName = "SidebarMenuSkeleton"

const SidebarMenuSub = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLUListElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"ul">
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ul
    ref={ref}
    data-sidebar="menu-sub"
    className={tw.def([className], {
        margin: "mx-3.5",
        display: "flex",
        minWidth: "min-w-0",
        translate: "translate-x-px",
        flexDirection: "flex-col",
        gap: "gap-1",
        borderWidth: "border-l",
        padding: ["px-2.5", "py-0.5"],
        "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
            display: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SidebarMenuSub.displayName = "SidebarMenuSub"

const SidebarMenuSubItem = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLLIElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"li">
>(({ ...props }, ref) => <li ref={ref} {...props} />)
SidebarMenuSubItem.displayName = "SidebarMenuSubItem"

const SidebarMenuSubButton = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLAnchorElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"a"> & {
    asChild?: boolean
    size?: "sm" | "md"
    isActive?: boolean
  }
>(({ asChild = false, size = "md", isActive, className, ...props }, ref) => {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "a"

  return (
    <Comp
      ref={ref}
      data-sidebar="menu-sub-button"
      data-size={size}
      data-active={isActive}
      className={tw.def([size === "sm" && "text-xs", size === "md" && "text-sm", className], {
          display: "flex",
          height: "h-7",
          minWidth: "min-w-0",
          translate: "-translate-x-px",
          alignItems: "items-center",
          gap: "gap-2",
          overflow: "overflow-hidden",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          padding: "px-2",
          outlineStyle: "outline-none",
          "focus-visible": {
              boxShadow: "focus-visible:ring-2",
          },
          disabled: {
              pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
              opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
          },
          "aria-disabled": {
              pointerEvents: "aria-disabled:pointer-events-none",
              opacity: "aria-disabled:opacity-50",
          },
          "[&>span:last-child]": {
              textOverflow: "[&>span:last-child]:truncate",
          },
          "[&>svg]": {
              width: "[&>svg]:size-4",
              flexShrink: "[&>svg]:shrink-0",
          },
          "group-data-[collapsible=icon]": {
              display: "group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
})
SidebarMenuSubButton.displayName = "SidebarMenuSubButton"

export {
  Sidebar,
  SidebarContent,
  SidebarFooter,
  SidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupAction,
  SidebarGroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel,
  SidebarHeader,
  SidebarInput,
  SidebarInset,
  SidebarMenu,
  SidebarMenuAction,
  SidebarMenuBadge,
  SidebarMenuButton,
  SidebarMenuItem,
  SidebarMenuSkeleton,
  SidebarMenuSub,
  SidebarMenuSubButton,
  SidebarMenuSubItem,
  SidebarProvider,
  SidebarRail,
  SidebarSeparator,
  SidebarTrigger,
  useSidebar,
}
